name: Corn Meal Muffins (Selby)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, sift together the cornmeal, flour, salt, baking powder, and sugar.
2. Add the eggs, milk, and melted lard to the dry ingredients. Mix well until combined.
3. Pour the batter into greased muffin cups.
4. Bake for 20 minutes in a hot oven (400-450°F).
